zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich於1285年8月3日出生在奧地利維恩時，她的父親Albrecht II von Habsburg30歲，母親Elisabeth of Carinthia22歲。她於1304年6月與Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年5月19日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希享年66歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇提洛爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich于1285年8月3日出生在奥地利維恩时，她的父亲Albrecht II von Habsburg30岁，母亲Elisabeth of Carinthia22岁。她于1304年6月与Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年5月19日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希享年66岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇提洛爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Österreich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Kurt, Uwe, Wolfgang.

German (rarely Österreich) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of Upper or Lower Austria, from German Österreich ‘Austria’, the name of which literally means ‘Eastern kingdom’.

variants.name: Oestreicher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Franz, Otto, Horst.  Jewish Shloime, Chaim, Mendy.
German (also Östreicher) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the province of Upper or Lower Austria (see Oesterreich ).

variants.name: Oestreich
meanings: German (also Östreich) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Oesterreich .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich was born on 3 August 1285, in Vienna, Austria, her father, Albrecht II von Habsburg, was 30 and her mother, Elisabeth of Carinthia, was 22. She married Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen in June 1304. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 May 1352, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in Tirol, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich est née le 3 août 1285, à Vienne, Autriche, son père, Albrecht II von Habsburg, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth of Carinthia, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen en juin 1304. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 mai 1352, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Tirol, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich am 3. August 1285 in Wien, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht II von Habsburg 30 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth of Carinthia 22. Sie hat im Juni 1304 Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Mai 1352 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Tirol, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich è nata il il 3 agosto 1285 nel Wien, Austria, sua padre, Albrecht II von Habsburg, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth of Carinthia, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen nel giugno 1304. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 maggio 1352, nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Tirolo, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreichが1285年8月3日にオーストリアウィンで生まれた時，父Albrecht II von Habsburgは30歳，母Elisabeth of Carinthiaは22歳であった。1304年6月にFrederic IV. Herzog von Lothringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年5月19日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで66歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチティロルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich(이)가 1285년 8월 3일 오스트리아 빈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht II von Habsburg(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth of Carinthia(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1304년 6월 Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 5월 19일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 티럴에 묻혔다.

mn.3. August 1285–19. Mai 1352: 1285 оны Наймдугаар сарын 3–1352 оны Тавдугаар сарын 19

pt.3. August 1285–19. Mai 1352: 3 de agosto de 1285–19 de maio de 1352
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich nasceu em 3 de agosto de 1285, em Wien, Áustria, seu pai, Albrecht II von Habsburg, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth of Carinthia, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen em junho de 1304. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de maio de 1352, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Tirol, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich родилась 3 августа 1285 г. в местности Вена, Австрия, её отцу по имени Albrecht II von Habsburg было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth of Carinthia, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen июнь 1304 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 мая 1352 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности тирол, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.3. August 1285–19. Mai 1352: 3 de agosto de 1285–19 de mayo de 1352
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich nació el 3 de agosto de 1285, en Wien, Austria, su papá, Albrecht II von Habsburg, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elisabeth of Carinthia, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen en junio de 1304. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1352, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Tirol, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
